trigger: Stage 2 (SICR) — 30+ DPD backstop, or a forward-looking adverse signal
action: Increase monitoring frequency; lender's review of the exposure

trigger: Deteriorating vs prior month, or persistent watch-list status
action: Restructure / strengthen security / lower limit; confirm staging & ECL

trigger: Stage 3 — 90+ DPD or a credit event (unlikely-to-pay where flagged)
action: Move to NPL workout; specific provision; recovery plan
